name: Citrus Salsa
recipeIngredient: 3 oranges - cut the pith and peel off and remove the flesh
3 lemons - cut the pith and peel off and remove the flesh
2 grapefruits - cut the pith and peel off and remove the flesh
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the oranges, lemons, and grapefruits, removing the pith and peeling them. Reserve the flesh.
2. Chop the serrano peppers, mint, and shallots.
3. In a bowl, combine the reserved orange, lemon, and grapefruit flesh with the chopped peppers, mint, shallots, olive oil, salt, and pepper.
4. Mix well and season to taste.
5. Serve the salsa over your favorite fish.
Yield: 1 1/2 cups salsa
